summary: Participant Check-in Bug Fix (Iteration 98) - All tests passed. The ParticipantCheckinBlock now correctly sends invitation_token to /api/checkin/manual, uses checked_in field for status, and includes accepted_pending_guarantee in status filter. Frontend participant view correctly shows check-in status and hides organizer-only elements.

backend_pytest: ✅ Timeline participant items have invitation_token field
✅ POST /api/checkin/manual accepts correct payload structure (invitation_token, device_info, lat, lon, gps_consent)
frontend_playwright: ✅ Dashboard loads with timeline (46 upcoming, 102 history)
✅ Organizer view: 'Check-in avec GPS' button visible
✅ Organizer view: Proof tracking section visible
✅ Organizer view: Participants list with 'Garanti' status
✅ Participant view: Check-in block shows 'Check-in confirmé'
✅ Participant view: Trust signal banner visible ('2 participants ont déjà confirmé leur engagement')
✅ Participant view: 'Gérer les participants' NOT visible (correct)
✅ Participant view: Proof tracking section visible

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ ParticipantCheckinBlock (line 79-124) correctly sends invitation_token in payload
✅ ParticipantCheckinBlock uses res.data?.checked_in for status check (line 86)
✅ ParticipantCheckinBlock includes GPS for physical appointments (lines 98-108)
✅ Status filter at line 641 includes accepted_pending_guarantee
context_for_next_testing_agent: Participant check-in bug fix verified. ParticipantCheckinBlock now correctly: (1) sends invitation_token to /api/checkin/manual, (2) uses checked_in field for status, (3) includes accepted_pending_guarantee in status filter. The test appointment 71b9df43-4032-4bdf-8e30-5c4369340acf has already been checked in (will return 409 on retry). For fresh check-in tests, create a new appointment or use a different one.

fix_1_payload.description: Frontend sent wrong payload (appointment_id, participant_id instead of invitation_token)
fix_1_payload.verification: ParticipantCheckinBlock now sends {invitation_token, device_info, latitude?, longitude?, gps_consent?}

fix_2_status_field.description: Check-in status used wrong response field (checkins instead of checked_in)

mocked_apis.Stripe: Dev mode - payment methods are pm_dev_* format
